visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a light blue cap, glasses, and a white "Roots Athletics" t-shirt stands in a well-lit home office or studio. In the background, there is a large Gundam model and a Mario figurine. He gestures enthusiastically with his right hand while looking directly into the camera. (2) The camera focuses on the Elgato Prompter, a device with a 9-inch screen displaying scrolling text in Traditional Chinese. The prompter is mounted on a camera setup, and the room lighting is bright. The man is seen in the reflection of the prompter's glass. (3) A close-up shot of the Elgato Stream Deck XL control panel, featuring 32 LCD keys with various colorful icons. A hand moves towards the device to demonstrate its functionality. The background shows a computer monitor and a gray desk mat. (4) The Key Light Mini is shown, a small rectangular LED panel that is turned on and emitting a bright, white light. The light is adjusted to show its brightness and color temperature range. It is mounted on top of the prompter. (5) The Facecam Pro is featured, a sleek black webcam perched atop a computer monitor. The camera lens is prominent, and an indicator light is visible. The scene is shot from a slightly low angle to emphasize the camera's position. (6) A smartphone mount is held and demonstrated. It is a black, adjustable bracket with a spring-loaded mechanism. A hand shows how the mount can be expanded and its soft padding for grip. The background is slightly blurred. (7) The man reappears in a wide shot, standing behind his desk. He opens his arms wide to show the entire integrated setup of the tech products he just discussed. On-screen graphics with checkboxes appear to summarize the benefits.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: @3ctim. [Slogan]: 打造高質感音內容!? (2) [Slogan]: 5款實用配件. [Variety]: 創作神隊友. (3) [Slogan]: Elgato Prompter. [Subtitle]: 內建9吋螢幕的提詞器. (4) [Slogan]: Stream Deck XL. [Subtitle]: 32鍵自定義LCD控制面板. (5) [Slogan]: Key Light Mini. [Subtitle]: 輕巧可攜LED補光燈. (6) [Slogan]: Facecam Pro. [Subtitle]: 全球首款4K 60fps網路攝影機. (7) [Slogan]: 智慧型手機支架. [Subtitle]: 可升降調節高度. (8) [Variety]: 穩固又防滑. [Slogan]: 專業就差這一步!

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin Chinese, opening the video with an enthusiastic greeting. The tone is professional yet excited. A high-tempo, upbeat electronic background music track with a strong, driving beat begins immediately, filling the acoustic space. (2) A subtle 'whoosh' transition sound marks a shift in the narration as the speaker begins describing the first product. His speech remains fast-paced and articulated clearly. The BGM continues at a consistent volume, maintaining the energetic atmosphere without masking the vocals. (3) A digital 'ding' sound effect triggers a transition to the next product description. The speaker's pitch rises slightly as he emphasizes the features of the control panel. The background music's synthesizer texture becomes more prominent during brief pauses in speech. (4) Another sharp 'click' or transition sound effect is heard as the audio focuses on the lighting equipment. The speaker's volume is projected and steady. The ambient noise floor is extremely low, indicating a clean studio-style recording with high signal clarity. (5) A rhythmic shift in the background music coincides with the description of the webcam. The speaker's intonation is dynamic, using rising contours to maintain viewer interest. Short, percussive sound effects are peppered throughout to punctuate key technical specifications mentioned. (6) The narrator's voice remains dominant and authoritative as he explains the final accessory. The BGM maintains its major-key tonality and steady BPM. There is a noticeable lack of any significant background interference or incidental noise during this segment. (7) The final phase begins with a concluding summary from the speaker. His arousal level remains high, ending on a positive and assertive note. The music swells slightly in volume toward the end before a final hard cut or fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of 5 items -> Closing recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend Elgato tech accessories specifically designed for content creators and streamers to improve production quality.
